description_long: This is a weathered, cylindrical metal barrel with a greenish, rust-streaked exterior and a flat, sealed top. The surface is mottled with patches of corrosion and grime, giving it an aged, industrial appearance. Three horizontal reinforcement ribs encircle the body, providing structural strength and visual segmentation. A rectangular yellow label with black text is affixed to the side, suggesting it may have once contained chemicals or industrial materials. The top features two small, raised bungs or plugs, typical of standard steel drums for filling and emptying contents. The overall look suggests it is a heavy-duty container commonly found in urban, industrial, or storage environments.
description: A weathered green metal barrel with rust patches, horizontal ribs, and a yellow label, featuring a sealed top with two bungs.
description_view_0: The front view shows the yellow label clearly on the right side and highlights the rust and grime on the barrel's surface.
description_view_1: This view displays the label more centrally, with the barrel's ribs and corrosion patterns visible across the body.
description_view_2: The label is partially visible on the right, and the top bungs are more apparent from this angle.
description_view_3: The label is again more central, and the surface texture and reinforcement ribs are clearly seen.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top, middle, and bottom
